executives.name: Leigh Curyer
executives.background: Mr. Curyer has over 20 years of experience in the resources sector. He was previously the CFO of First Uranium Corporation and has held senior positions at Accord Nuclear Resources and Deloitte.

executives.name: Benjamin Salter
executives.background: Mr. Salter is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate finance within the mining industry.

executives.name: Travis McPherson
executives.background: Mr. McPherson has been with NexGen since 2014 and has been involved in all aspects of the company's development, including corporate strategy and finance.

executives.name: Gillian McCombie
executives.background: Ms. McCombie has over 25 years of experience in human resources and corporate operations, previously holding senior roles at various mining companies.

executives.name: Aaron Keay
executives.background: Mr. Keay is an experienced entrepreneur and capital markets professional. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies in the resource and technology sectors.

executives.name: Craig Parry
executives.background: Geologist and co-founder of Inventa Capital. Former CEO of IsoEnergy and co-founder of NexGen Energy.

executives.name: Sybil Veenman
executives.background: Ms. Veenman was Senior Vice President and General Counsel of Barrick Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Trevor Thiele
executives.background: Mr. Thiele has over 30 years of experience in senior financial roles. He was the CFO of several major Australian resource companies.

executives.name: Warren Gilman
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Queen’s Road Capital Investment Ltd. Former Chairman and CEO of CEF Holdings.

executives.name: Richard Patricio
executives.background: Mr. Patricio is the President and CEO of Mega Uranium Ltd. and has over 20 years of experience in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher McFadden
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McFadden is a lawyer with extensive experience in the mining industry, particularly in corporate development and legal affairs. He was previously with Rio Tinto.

tenure_dates.title: Director and Chairman of the Board

board_of_directors.name: Leigh Curyer
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of NexGen Energy Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Patricio
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Patricio is the President and CEO of Mega Uranium Ltd. and has over 20 years of experience in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Trevor Thiele
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Thiele has over 30 years of experience in senior financial roles, including CFO positions in the resources sector.

board_of_directors.name: Warren Gilman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gilman is the Chairman and CEO of Queen's Road Capital Investment Ltd. and has extensive experience in global mining finance.

board_of_directors.name: Aaron Keay
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Keay is an experienced entrepreneur and capital markets professional. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies in the resource and technology sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Craig Parry
board_of_directors.background: Geologist and co-founder of Inventa Capital. Former CEO of IsoEnergy and co-founder of NexGen Energy.

board_of_directors.name: Sybil Veenman
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Veenman was Senior Vice President and General Counsel of Barrick Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Benjamin Salter
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Salter is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate finance. He previously served as the Vice President, Finance of the Company.

board_of_directors.name: Brad Wall
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Wall served as the 14th Premier of Saskatchewan from 2007 to 2018. He has extensive experience in economic development and the energy sector.

board_of_directors.name: Karri Howlett
board_of_directors.background: President of Karri Howlett Consulting. Over 20 years of experience in corporate strategy and risk management.
